title: Morpheus Inpatient Analytics
description: Morpheus provides real-time inpatient analytics built on MIMIC-IV ICU data. Explore census views, patient acuity distributions, length-of-stay trends, and clinical outcome patterns across the ICU population.
tips: The census view shows current ICU occupancy and patient distribution across care units.
Use the acuity filter to segment patients by severity score (APACHE, SOFA) for focused analysis.
Length-of-stay distributions highlight outlier cases that may benefit from clinical review.
Outcome trends are stratified by diagnosis group — use this to identify mortality or complication patterns.
